summary: Tested YouTube video embedding feature in marketplace. Backend APIs (11/11 tests passed) - marketplace returns video_intro_url, video ID extraction works correctly. Frontend UI verified: Video Introduction section, YouTube thumbnail, play button overlay all display correctly in provider profile modal.

integration_issues.issue: TouchableOpacity click on video thumbnail not consistently triggering modal opening on web platform. This may be a React Native Web event handling quirk.
integration_issues.note: Video thumbnail and play button UI renders correctly. Modal code is properly implemented. Click handler may need web-specific adjustment.

issues: 'shadow*' style props deprecated warning - should use 'boxShadow' instead

action_items: Investigate web-specific click handling for TouchableOpacity video thumbnail - modal state updates may not trigger on click
critical_code_review_comments: YouTubePlayer.tsx component well structured with proper TypeScript interfaces
getYouTubeVideoId utility handles standard, short, and embed YouTube URL formats correctly
marketplace.tsx correctly integrates video thumbnail, play button overlay, and 'Watch Video' label

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Video UI elements render correctly, modal click may need verification

test_credentials.provider_with_video: Sarah Mitchell (demo doula) has video_intro_url set

Backend tests verify API returns video_intro_url field and video ID extraction patterns.
